message:
test(wasm): add dual-validator provenance assertions to release gate tests

Update WASM release gate contract tests to verify the new dual-validator
provenance requirement:

- Evidence packet, readiness checklist, and rollout tests now assert
  presence of corepack pnpm run validate, validate_package_build.sh,
  and validate_npm_pack_smoke.sh references
- npm pack smoke contract: add root_validate_script_runs_npm_pack_smoke_validation
- Package build contract: add root_validate_script_runs_browser_package_build_validation

These tests enforce that release docs and scripts stay aligned with the
tightened promotion gate requirements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -230,6 +230,9 @@ fn release_strategy_doc_requires_package_and_consumer_artifacts_for_ga_promotion
         "real packages",
         "consumer builds",
         "real behavioral evidence",
+        "corepack pnpm run validate",
+        "bash scripts/validate_package_build.sh",
+        "bash scripts/validate_npm_pack_smoke.sh",
         "artifacts/npm/package_release_validation.json",
         "artifacts/npm/package_pack_dry_run_summary.json",
         "artifacts/npm/publish_outcome.json",
